WCW/nWo Revenge: Recompiled (beta)
===================================

A native PC port of WCW/nWo Revenge (N64, USA), produced by static
recompilation. This download contains NO game assets — you must own the game
and supply your own ROM of the US release.

Getting started
---------------
1. Unzip this folder anywhere and run RevengeRecompiled.exe.
2. Click "Load ROM" and select your WCW/nWo Revenge (USA) ROM
   (SHA1 E1711A2511394B9357B5F1AC8CA5CC17BD674836). The launcher validates
   and remembers it.
3. Click "Start Game".

Notes
-----
- Windows may show a SmartScreen warning because the exe is unsigned:
  "More info" -> "Run anyway".
- Saves and settings live in %LOCALAPPDATA%\RevengeRecompiled\. To make the
  install portable instead, create an empty file named portable.txt next to
  the exe.
- A log file (RevengeRecompiled.log) is written to the same folder — include
  it when reporting bugs.
- F11 or Alt+Enter toggles fullscreen.

Project page, source code, and issue tracker:
https://github.com/jessetbh/WCWnWoRevengeRecomp

License: GNU GPLv3 (see COPYING). This project is not affiliated with or
endorsed by Nintendo, THQ, AKI, or WWE.
